name: ETODY 90 TAB 1*10
description: A non-steroidal anti-inflammatory medicine used for relieving moderate pain and swelling in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, osteoarthritis, and dental surgery.
storageInstructions: Does not require special storage conditions. Keep out of reach of children.

name: EVION 600 CAP
description: Vitamin E supplement that supports the body's natural defences and helps repair cells.
uses: Prevents and treats Vitamin E deficiency
dosage: One capsule daily or as advised, taken with water after a meal.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight.

name: EVION LC 1*15TAB
description: A nutritional supplement combining levocarnitine and vitamin E used to treat carnitine deficiency and muscle cramps/spasms.
dosage: As prescribed by doctor; take whole with water, with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: EXTACEF 200 DT 1*10
description: An antibiotic medicine containing cefixime used in treating bacterial infections of the urinary tract, lungs, throat, and ear.
uses: Bacterial infections of ear, nose, sinuses
dosage: As directed by doctor; swallow whole with water; complete full course.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C, protected from direct sunlight, heat and moisture.

name: EXTACEF DROPS 1*10ML
description: Contains Cefixime, an antibiotic belonging to the cephalosporin group.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor; shake well before use.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C, protect from direct sunlight, keep away from children.

name: EXTACEF DT 100MG 1*10
description: An antibiotic medicine containing cefixime used for treating bacterial infections including urinary tract, respiratory, and throat infections.
uses: Bacterial infections of ear, nose, sinuses
dosage: Should be taken as directed by the doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C, protected from direct sunlight, heat and moisture.

name: FEBUTEC 40 10 TAB
description: Febuxostat, a xanthine oxidase inhibitor used for long-term management of chronic hyperuricemia in patients with gouty arthritis.
dosage: Take as directed by physician; once daily at a fixed time.
storageInstructions: Store in a dry place, protected from light, heat and moisture.
